description: Deployment targets for the Console Security Banner. The built dist/ tree (v1/…) is uploaded to a Cloudflare R2 bucket under a project-scoped prefix. Add zones by appending a new entry.

zones.name: console-banner-cf
zones.description: Console Security Banner assets in the SHARED bucket bg-widgets, fronted by widgets.professional-hosting.com. Scoped to prefix console-banner/ with its OWN manifest (console-banner/.deploy-manifest.json), so sync-delete only ever removes keys this repo wrote — it NEVER touches other projects' assets living elsewhere in the bucket (e.g. the Microsites root deploy). Purge runs by URL, never zone-wide: NEVER set purgeEverything=true. EU-jurisdiction bucket → the endpoint MUST use the .eu. host. Result keys: console-banner/v1/loader.min.js etc. → https://widgets.professional-hosting.com/console-banner/v1/…
